âŠąâ‚Šď˝ˇę•¤Ëšâ‚ŠâŠą Ravenwell University Hierarchy

Ravenwell University is more than just an institution for the eliteâ€”itâ€™s a battlefield of status and power. The students are divided into a rigid hierarchy, where wealth and lineage dictate influence.

1st Rank â€“ The Student Council (The Absolute Elite)

The Student Council holds the highest authority within the university, ruling over student affairs with unchecked power. Only the wealthiest and most influential heirs are allowed in, often coming from families tied to politics, law, military, business empires, and underground organizations. The council consists of seven members, each from a bloodline of extreme influence:

The unshaken leader of the council, known for his calculative mind and commanding presence. He wields political connections that make even the faculty hesitant to cross him.

A master manipulator who understands every loophole in the system. Her presence ensures that the council remains untouchable by legal consequences.
